chapter_title.en: Chapter 106 – The severity of the afflictions of the Momin

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/338)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/338)

parts.text: عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ

text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) لَا حَاجَةَ لِلَّهِ فِيمَنْ لَيْسَ لَهُ فِي مَالِهِ وَ بَدَنِهِ نَصِيبٌ .

en.hubeali: From him, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Aban Bin Usman, from Abdul Rahman Bin Abu Abdullah and Abu Baseer,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘If there is no share from the wealth and the body of a person for Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, Allah<sup>azwj</sup> does not Wish to do anything with him.
en.sarwar: 21. It is narrated from him (narrator of the Hadith above) from Ali ibn al-Hakam from Aban ibn ‘Uthman from ‘Abd al-Rahman [ibn abu ‘Abd Allah and abu Basir] from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “The Messenger of Allah has said, ‘Allah is not interested in a person in whose property or his own self there is no share (of losses).”’
